description: CLI for managing Framer websites — CMS, canvas, code files, publishing, and site migration. Requires Node.

novel_features.name: Site Snapshot & Diff
novel_features.description: Track your Framer project's evolution over time with full structural snapshots and visual diffs

novel_features.name: Multi-Project Dashboard
novel_features.description: Query across all registered Framer projects at once — stale CMS, unpublished changes, collection health

novel_features.name: CMS Sync with Dry-Run
novel_features.description: Import CMS content from CSV/JSON/Sheets with a preview diff before committing changes

novel_features.name: CMS Schema Diff
novel_features.description: Declare CMS schema in YAML and diff it against the live project — infrastructure-as-code for Framer CMS

novel_features.name: Bulk Asset Pipeline
novel_features.description: Upload a directory of images and auto-bind them to CMS items by filename-to-slug matching

novel_features.name: CMS Relationship Validator
novel_features.description: Find broken collection references, orphan items, and circular refs across your CMS

novel_features.name: Design Token Import
novel_features.description: Import CSS variables or Tailwind config as Framer color and text styles — no manual recreation

novel_features.name: Code File Sync
novel_features.description: Edit TSX components locally in your editor, then push to Framer — eliminates copy-paste workflow
